original_statement: how many russian detainees are at guantanamo?
mutated_statement: how many people are at some place?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Location generalization: Specific group "russian detainees" generalized to "people" | Specific location "guantanamo" generalized to "some place" (russian detainees → people | guantanamo → some place)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从 judge_thought 中可见关键语句：“Interpreting 'at some place' as those still present (no departure date)... Only row 9 (Ravil Mingazov) has no departure date, so there is 1 person still at the place.” Agent 未提及问题的模糊性或不确定性，也未请求澄清。相反，Agent 直接以自己的假设（将“在某地”解释为“未离开/出发日期为空”）执行计数并给出具体答案“1”。因为行为中缺乏任何表示歧义、需要更多信息或提出疑问的措辞，且直接按自身理解给出结论，故归类为“无法意识到指令模糊”。
